questionHtml: Calculate the maximum possible volume of the box made from the second piece of cardboard.
markschemeHtml:
44 or 26 seen          (A1)

attempting to adjust the constant(s) in the given volume formula          (M1)

volume of second box =(44-2x)(26-2x)(x)

(New maximum volume =) 2730  cm3  (2726.13…cm3)          A1

Note: Units must be seen to award the final A1. Award (A1)(M1)A0 for the maximum given as a coordinate pair.

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Calculate the maximum possible volume of the box made from the second piece of cardboard.
